items.step: Capture baseline split inventory and public-surface audit targets
items.notes: Lock the zero-drift file set before cutting code.

items.step: Extract raw runtime kernel into src/raw_kernel.zig
items.notes: Move runtime, frame, suspension, context, and cache machinery.
Own Outcome, Pending, EscapedOwner, reset, shift, and driveFrame without changing semantics.

items.step: Reduce src/raw.zig to a thin compatibility barrel plus barrel-safe tests
items.notes: Keep raw.zig path stable and avoid new public drift.

items.step: Move only internal-access tests to the owning implementation files
items.notes: Do not widen symbol visibility just to preserve old test placement.

items.step: Run closure suite, public-surface audit, and st integrity checks
items.notes: Require green closure suite plus explicit no-drift audit.
